title: PCEA-AER: Power-Compute Envelope Advantage PPO with Active-Window Energy Reallocation
description: This repository provides the reproducibility package for PCEA-AER, including source code, experiment configurations, processed benchmark data, a trained checkpoint, evaluation scripts, result tables, and documentation for heterogeneous CPU-GPU DAG workflow scheduling under time-varying power-envelope constraints.
